---
title: "All Biases"
subtitle: "Browse, search, and filter all documented behavioural biases."
listing:
  contents: biases
  type: table
  sort: "title asc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Bias"
    description: "Description"
    categories: "Category"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

Use the search bar above or the filter panel on the right to narrow down biases by category or keyword.
